Describes ' 'workflows using cdi:Activity, cdi:Step, ' 'cdi:ProcessingAgent, and cdi:Parameter vocabulary ' 'from the DDI Cross-Domain Integration specification.', 'properties': {'@id': {'description': 'Identifier for this activity ' 'node', 'type': 'string'}, '@type': {'anyOf': [{'const': 'cdi:Activity', 'type': 'string'}, {'contains': {'const': 'cdi:Activity'}, 'items': {'type': 'string'}, 'type': 'array'}], 'description': 'Must be or include ' 'cdi:Activity'}, 'cdi:description': {'description': 'Plain text ' 'description of the ' 'activity', 'type': 'string'}, 'cdi:displayLabel': {'anyOf': [{'$ref': '#/$defs/LabelForDisplay'}, {'items': {'$ref': '#/$defs/LabelForDisplay'}, 'type': 'array'}], 'description': 'Multilingual ' 'display label'}, 'cdi:entityProduced': {'description': 'Entities ' 'produced as ' 'outputs by this ' 'activity', 'items': {'$ref': '#/$defs/Reference'}, 'type': 'array'}, 'cdi:entityUsed': {'description': 'Entities used as ' 'inputs by this ' 'activity', 'items': {'$ref': '#/$defs/Reference'}, 'type': 'array'}, 'cdi:hasSubActivity': {'description': 'Nested ' 'sub-activities ' 'within this ' 'activity ' '(cdi:Activity). ' 'Use @id ' 'references to ' 'Activity nodes ' 'defined ' 'elsewhere in ' 'the graph.', 'items': {'$ref': '#/$defs/id-reference'}, 'type': 'array'}, 'cdi:has_Step': {'description': 'Ordered steps within ' 'this activity ' '(cdi:Step)', 'items': {'anyOf': [{'$ref': '#/$defs/Step'}, {'$ref': '#/$defs/id-reference'}]}, 'type': 'array'}, 'cdi:identifier': {'$ref': '#/$defs/Identifier', 'description': 'Formal identifier ' 'for this activity'}, 'cdi:name': {'anyOf': [{'$ref': '#/$defs/ObjectName'}, {'items': {'$ref': '#/$defs/ObjectName'}, 'type': 'array'}], 'description': 'Structured name for the ' 'activity (ObjectName)'}, 'cdi:standardModelMapping': {'anyOf': [{'$ref': '#/$defs/Reference'}, {'items': {'$ref': '#/$defs/Reference'}, 'type': 'array'}], 'description': 'Reference ' 'to a ' 'standard ' 'process ' 'model ' '(e.g. ' 'GSBPM)'}}, 'required': ['@type', 'cdi:name'], 'title': 'DDI-CDI Provenance Activity', 'type': 'object', 'x-jsonld-prefixes': {'cdi': 'http://ddialliance.org/Specification/DDI-CDI/1.0/RDF/'}} On instance: [{'@id': 'ex:activity-soil-chem-analysis', '@type': 'cdi:Activity', 'cdi:description': 'Major and trace element analysis of soil samples ' 'collected along a 200 km transect across the ' 'Great Basin, using ICP-MS and XRF spectrometry ' 'with certified reference materials.', 'cdi:displayLabel': {'@type': 'cdi:LabelForDisplay', 'cdi:languageSpecificString': {'@type': 'cdi:LanguageString', 'cdi:content': 'GB ' 'Soil ' 'Chemistry ' '2025', 'cdi:language': 'en'}}, 'cdi:entityProduced': [{'@type': 'cdi:Reference', samples collected ' 'June 2025, sites GB-001 ' 'through GB-045'}, {'@type': 'cdi:Reference', 'cdi:description': 'EPA Method 6200 - XRF ' 'Analysis of Soils', 'cdi:uri':
